entities.name: Auto Processor (Python Script)
entities.context: A script that monitors Google Drive and processes transcripts

entities.name: Processing Request Queue
entities.context: A queue for handling meeting requests with information about transcripts and stakeholders

entities.name: Scheduled Task / Command
entities.context: Commands that trigger the processing of pending meetings

entities.name: Zo Processes
entities.context: The process employing specified commands to handle meeting requests

relationships.context: The Auto Processor generates requests that are stored in the Processing Request Queue
The scheduled tasks are related to the processing of requests in the queue
The command triggers the Zo Processes to handle the requests
Zo Processes use information from the Processing Request Queue
